design_plan: rng=42; hero_math=1120px max, 2-3 lines; AIDA=attention(hero),interest(compare),desire(cache),action(CTA); density_check=compare-grid grid-auto-flow:dense; label_sweep=all competitors named; contrast=black/white pills verified
headline: Super vs Orchids — personal AI agents for real computer work

site_brief.goal: Create a fair but persuasive competitor comparison page for Super vs Orchids. Use supplied sources for current facts, avoid fake claims, and make the practical argument that Super is better suited for repeated computer-use work because its cache can lower repeated execution cost.
site_brief.title: Super vs Orchids

summary: A fair comparison for people evaluating Super against Orchids. Orchids explores experimental AI assistants and automation ideas. Super is built for durable, repeated computer‑use workflows — with a reusable computer‑use cache that makes real agents faster and cheaper over time.
